description.ko: 공중의 프레넬 유리 엔진이 백색 에너지를 빠른 무지개 caustic과 색수차의 빛 자국으로 분산한다.
description.en: An airborne Fresnel glass engine fractures white energy into fast rainbow caustics and chromatic light scars.

prompt: PRISM-2 refraction cascade in a bright zero-gravity white field: an exploded cube of ultra-clear Fresnel glass tiles, tiny pyramid cells, and hollow cylindrical light wells hangs apart with precise air gaps, like a transparent optical engine caught mid-activation. Multiple white flash-bolts snap through the gaps from different directions instead of one straight beam, ricocheting tile to tile and breaking into high-speed spectral slices of #FF0080 magenta, #00FF80 mint green, #8000FF violet, and #FFFF00 yellow. Rainbow caustics appear as sharp checkerboard flares, fractured ring halos, and angled light scars suspended in the air; every beveled micro-pyramid edge shows crisp chromatic aberration and polished internal reflections. Bright pure-energy mood, fast motion streaks, low sparse particles only, clean luminous atmosphere, no tabletop setup, no dark surface, no traditional triangular prism.
